ConfigResponse.description: GET /api/config returns the masked runtime config dict verbatim.
ConfigResponse.title: ConfigResponse

JavdbLoginRefreshPayload.description:
Optional request body for POST /api/login/refresh.

Empty body (or omitted body) defaults to proxy_mode='auto', which preserves
the original behavior. Existing callers that POST without a body still work.
JavdbLoginRefreshPayload.title: JavdbLoginRefreshPayload

JavdbLoginRefreshResponseV2.description: Structured response for POST /api/login/refresh with categorized errors.
JavdbLoginRefreshResponseV2.title: JavdbLoginRefreshResponseV2

JavdbSessionStatus.description: Status of the current JavDB session cookie.
JavdbSessionStatus.title: JavdbSessionStatus

MovieSearchItem.description: A single MovieHistory row in the search response.
MovieSearchItem.title: MovieSearchItem

total_freed_bytes.description: Estimated bytes reclaimed by dedup, summed from the pre-deletion ExistingFolderSize of completed records. Approximate, not exact.
total_freed_bytes.title: Total Freed Bytes

TorrentSearchItem.description: A single TorrentHistory row (with joined movie data) in the search response.
TorrentSearchItem.title: TorrentSearchItem

get.description: List workflow runs, optionally filtered by workflow ID.
Return the logs download URL for a run.

schema.title: Response Dismiss Hint Api Onboarding Dismiss Hint Post

post.description: Roll back or resume stale in-progress/finalizing sessions.

Send a test email to the configured recipient.

``body.recipient`` is accepted for forward-compatibility but is currently
ignored — ``send_email`` targets the module-level ``EMAIL_TO`` constant and
has no per-call recipient override.  If a custom recipient is provided, the
email still goes to the configured address and the response notes this.

schema.title: Response Email Test Api Ops Email Test Post

post.description: Resend a previously failed email notification.
